scenario.name: OPTIONS ping
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:healthcheck@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: 0
